hero.subtitle: Team: 11 researchers, 5 technicians, 2 educators and 10+ students. Based at the Bernardino Rivadavia Museum (Buenos Aires). 5 Nature covers and 400+ publications. In the last 20 years: 35 species in Argentina and 5 in Antarctica/LatAm (40 total).

goal.title: Publish a new article in Nature
goal.subtitle: Antarctic expeditions 2027–2032 (IAA & CONICET) to uncover 70 Ma dinosaurs.

softTissues.title: Carnivore with soft tissues
softTissues.meta: First evidence of muscles and blood in South American dinosaurs.

raptor.title: New high-latitude raptor
raptor.meta: Insights into Patagonian ecosystems and cold adaptation.

nest.title: First theropod nest
nest.meta: 90 Ma. Seven eggs with a coiled snake: predator or nest mate?

cta.title: Make history with us
cta.copy: We comply with Argentine National Law and hold official permits. In-house fossil prep lab.
